reviews.review_description: I got this as i have back issues and thought this may help with my recovery but I cannot find any in app purchases only 6 free workouts without any other workouts this is a pointless app

developer_response.body:
Hi Shazza,

Thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear about your experience. We’ve recently added a new program called the 5-Day Back Challenge to help with recovery and strengthen your back. Please check it out in the Meta Quest Fitness Workout Exercise app. We hope this new addition meets your needs and supports your recovery journey.
